SEARCH
Package com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.toSingle.oneToOne

Class UnlinkOneToOneEndpointRelation

java.lang.Object
com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.EndpointRelation
com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.ServiceRepositoryEndpointRelation
com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.toSingle.oneToOne.UnlinkOneToOneEndpointRelation
public class UnlinkOneToOneEndpointRelation extends ServiceRepositoryEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a DELETE endpoint to remove (unlink) an entity from a One-to-One association.
